ITEM: The Legend of Ngeso
DETAILS: According to Luo oral tradition, the story centers on an elderly man named Ngeso who was passionately in love with the massive stone formation. He would wake up every morning, walk to the rocks, and spend the entire day inside the hidden caves, forcing his wife to bring him his meals on-site. When villagers or […]

ITEM: The Zipton Story: “The Kicak Legend”
DETAILS: Long ago, while traveling across the golden savannahs of East Africa, the explorers of Zipton Tours arrived at a quiet highland village where the Kicak people lived. They were welcomed not with luxury or noise, but with firelight, silence, and stories passed down through generations. That night, under a vast glowing moon, the elders of […]


ITEM: Let’s take it from the top
DETAILS: Zipton Tours exists for a reason – it’s our journey, our vision, and because of your support. It’s about learning about the cultures, making memories, meeting people, and experiencing the beauty around us. Travel experiences are supposed to be accessible, meaningful and unforgettable – and this has been Zipton Tours’ goal from the outset. We […]
